hero.titleLine1: A platform born from a real problem,
hero.subtitle: — the marketplace built in Conakry, for all of Guinea.

story.label: How it all started
story.title: My story
story.paragraph1: I'm a young Guinean developer based in Conakry. It all started the day I wanted to get into online marketing: it was hard, frustrating, and I simply wasn't making any sales.
story.paragraph2: The available platforms were either European or American — never designed for our reality — and nothing guaranteed a sale. So I looked for a real Guinean platform, made for us. I couldn't find one.
story.paragraph3Before: So I built my own — to help everyone in the same situation I was in: helping Guineans to
story.paragraph3After: , in Guinea. That's the idea behind the name: TrouveTout224.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: Enable every Guinean to buy and sell easily and confidently, right at home — without going through platforms that don't know us.

items.title: 100% Guinean
items.desc: Designed, built, and made for Guinea — not an adapted copy.

items.title: Trust above all
items.desc: Verified sellers and transparency, so you can buy and sell with peace of mind.

items.title: Simple and accessible
items.desc: A platform that's easy to use for everyone, even without being a digital expert.

items.title: Made here, built for Guinea
items.desc: Our cities, our habits, our reality — not an imported platform simply translated into French.

items.title: Your own online shop
items.desc: Every seller can create their shop and showcase all their items in one place.

items.title: Direct contact on WhatsApp
items.desc: No complicated middleman: buyers and sellers talk to each other directly.

items.title: A community-driven platform
items.desc: Built with and for the Guinean community, evolving based on your feedback.

cta.title: Join the TrouveTout224 adventure
cta.text: Whether you're here to buy or sell, you're right at home. Join thousands of Guineans who find everything in one place.
